query: SELECT id, name, address, neighborhood FROM establishments WHERE (address LIKE '%Fradique Coutinho, 986%' OR address LIKE '%Alves Guimarães, 1091%' OR address LIKE '%Alves Guimaraes, 1091%' OR address LIKE '%Cação, 51%' OR address LIKE '%Cação, 57%' OR address LIKE '%Cacao, 51%' OR address LIKE '%Cacao, 57%' OR address LIKE '%Dr. Dolzani, 638%' OR address LIKE '%Dolzani, 638%' OR address LIKE '%Lopes de Oliveira, 349%' OR address LIKE '%Dante Carraro, 94%') LIMIT 50;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT id, name, address, neighborhood FROM establishments WHERE (address LIKE '%Fradique Coutinho, 986%' OR address LIKE '%Alves Guimarães, 1091%' OR address LIKE '%Alves Guimaraes, 1091%' OR address LIKE '%Cação, 51%' OR address LIKE '%Cação, 57%' OR address LIKE '%Cacao, 51%' OR address LIKE '%Cacao, 57%' OR address LIKE '%Dr. Dolzani, 638%' OR address LIKE '%Dolzani, 638%' OR address LIKE '%Lopes de Oliveira, 349%' OR address LIKE '%Dante Carraro, 94%') LIMIT 50;
